name: Queasy Lantern (Lesser)
description:
This is wrapped in decrepit leather skin. It constantly emits light in a (and dim light in the next 60 feet). You can close or open internal shutters with an Interact action to block or reveal the light.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You slide in a magical lens that causes the lantern to emit a pale green light and then aim the lantern. All creatures in the lantern's of bright light (but not those in the dim light), must attempt a save. On a failure, a creature becomes Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure). The light then reverts to normal as the lens slides out of place.
